name: Roisin Conaty
bio: Roisin Conaty is a British and Irish comedian, actress and writer who won the Edinburgh Festival Best Newcomer Award in 2010 for her show Hero, Warrior, Fireman, Liar. Her stand-up is loose, self-deprecating and anecdotal. She created and starred in the Channel 4 sitcom GameFace and played Roxy in the Netflix series After Life.

timeline.ev: Wins Best Newcomer at the Edinburgh Festival for Hero, Warrior, Fireman, Liar
Begins playing Jo in the Channel 4 sitcom Man Down
Performs on Live at the Apollo
Her sitcom GameFace, which she created and wrote, airs its first series
Plays Roxy in the Netflix series After Life
Co-hosts the first series of LOL: Last One Laughing UK

accolades: Heat magazine Unmissables Comedian of the Year (2019)
Creator and writer of the Channel 4 sitcom GameFace

bits.yt_title: Roisin Conaty and Addiction to Cheesecake | Live at the Apollo | BBC Comedy Greats
